User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user account in the SquadForge application, storing personal and contact information.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and communication.

avatarUrl.description: URL to the user's profile avatar image (optional).

notificationsEnabled.description: Indicates if the user has globally enabled push notifications.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

Team.title: Team
Team.description: Represents a sports team or group within the application, providing a collaborative space for its members.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Team entity.

teamName.description: The official name of the team.

sport.description: The sport the team is associated with.

teamLogoUrl.description: URL to the team's logo image (optional).

teamCode.description: A unique 6-character alphanumeric code used for joining the team.

creatorId.description: Reference to the User who created this team and is automatically assigned the 'Admin' role. (Relationship: User 1:N Team)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the team was created.

TeamMembership.title: TeamMembership
TeamMembership.description: Represents the relationship between a user and a team, including their role and team-specific details.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TeamMembership entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User associated with this membership. (Relationship: User 1:N TeamMembership)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team associated with this membership. (Relationship: Team 1:N TeamMembership)

role.description: The role of the user within this specific team.

position.description: The user's position within the team (optional, editable by Admin).

jerseyNumber.description: The user's jersey number for the team (optional, editable by Admin).

joinedAt.description: Timestamp when the user joined this team.

Post.title: Post
Post.description: Represents a post on a team's activity feed, allowing members to share updates, images, or link events.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Post entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this post belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Post)

authorId.description: Reference to the User who created this post. (Relationship: User 1:N Post)

content.description: The main text content of the post.

imageUrl.description: URL to an optional single image attached to the post.

linkedEventId.description: Reference to an optional Event associated with this post. (Relationship: Event 1:N Post)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the post was created.

Comment.title: Comment
Comment.description: Represents a comment made on a Post within a team's activity feed.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Comment entity.

postId.description: Reference to the Post this comment belongs to. (Relationship: Post 1:N Comment)

authorId.description: Reference to the User who created this comment. (Relationship: User 1:N Comment)

content.description: The text content of the comment.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created.

Event.title: Event
Event.description: Represents a scheduled team event, managed by admins.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Event entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this event belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Event)

startTime.description: The start time of the event.

endTime.description: The end time of the event (optional).

location.description: The location where the event will take place (optional).

description.description: A detailed description of the event (optional).

createdBy.description: Reference to the User (Admin) who created this event. (Relationship: User 1:N Event)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the event was created.

RSVP.title: RSVP
RSVP.description: Records a user's response to an event invitation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the RSVP entity.

eventId.description: Reference to the Event the RSVP is for. (Relationship: Event 1:N RSVP)

userId.description: Reference to the User who submitted the RSVP. (Relationship: User 1:N RSVP)

status.description: The user's RSVP status for the event.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the RSVP status was last updated.

Availability.title: Availability
Availability.description: Records a user's declared unavailability for a specific date within a team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Availability entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who marked themselves unavailable. (Relationship: User 1:N Availability)

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this availability applies to. (Relationship: Team 1:N Availability)

date.description: The specific date for which the user is unavailable.

status.description: The availability status, which is always 'unavailable'.

File.title: File
File.description: Represents a file uploaded and shared within a team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the File entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this file belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N File)

fileUrl.description: The URL where the file is stored.

fileName.description: The original name of the uploaded file.

uploadedBy.description: Reference to the User who uploaded this file. (Relationship: User 1:N File)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the file was uploaded.

GroupChat.title: GroupChat
GroupChat.description: Represents a group messaging chat within a specific team.

id.description: Unique identifier for the GroupChat entity.

teamId.description: Reference to the Team this group chat belongs to. (Relationship: Team 1:N GroupChat)

name.description: The name of the group chat.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created this group chat. (Relationship: User 1:N GroupChat)

memberIds.description: References to the Users who are members of this group chat. (Relationship: User N:N GroupChat)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the group chat was created.

isDeleted.description: A flag indicating if the chat has been globally deleted by an admin.

ChatMessage.title: ChatMessage
ChatMessage.description: Represents an individual message sent within a GroupChat.

id.description: Unique identifier for the ChatMessage entity.

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat this message belongs to. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N ChatMessage)

authorId.description: Reference to the User who sent this message. (Relationship: User 1:N ChatMessage)

type.description: The type of content in the message (e.g., 'text' or 'poll').

content.description: The text content of the message (if type is 'text').

pollId.description: Reference to the Poll associated with this message (if type is 'poll'). (Relationship: Poll 1:N ChatMessage)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the message was sent.

UserChatHidden.title: UserChatHidden
UserChatHidden.description: Records chats that a specific user has chosen to hide from their view.

id.description: Unique identifier for the UserChatHidden entity.

userId.description: Reference to the User who hid the chat. (Relationship: User 1:N UserChatHidden)

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat that was hidden. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N UserChatHidden)

hiddenAt.description: Timestamp when the user hid the chat.

Poll.title: Poll
Poll.description: Represents a poll created within a GroupChat for collective decision-making.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Poll entity.

chatId.description: Reference to the GroupChat this poll belongs to. (Relationship: GroupChat 1:N Poll)

question.description: The question posed in the poll.

options.description: An array of possible answers for the poll. Minimum 2, maximum 6 options.

createdBy.description: Reference to the User who created this poll. (Relationship: User 1:N Poll)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the poll was created.

isClosed.description: A flag indicating if the poll has been closed, disabling further voting.

PollVote.title: PollVote
PollVote.description: Records a user's vote on a specific poll.

id.description: Unique identifier for the PollVote entity.

pollId.description: Reference to the Poll this vote is for. (Relationship: Poll 1:N PollVote)

userId.description: Reference to the User who cast this vote. (Relationship: User 1:N PollVote)

selectedOptionIndex.description: The index of the option (from the Poll's 'options' array) that the user selected.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the vote was last updated (e.g., changed selection).

Feature.title: Feature
Feature.description: Represents a distinct feature or capability within the SquadForge application, used for plan management.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Feature entity (e.g., 'schedule_games_events').

description.description: A human-readable description of what this feature enables.

Plan.title: Plan
Plan.description: Defines a subscription or access plan within the application, bundling specific features.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Plan entity (e.g., 'StarterSquad', 'SquadPro').

isPublic.description: Indicates if the plan is publicly visible for users to choose.

isContactOnly.description: If true, users must contact sales or support to obtain this plan.

billingType.description: The billing cycle or type associated with the plan.

featureIds.description: References to Feature entities that are enabled as part of this plan. (Relationship: Plan N:N Feature)

definition.description: Global collection for defining all available features in the application. Documents are keyed by `featureId`. Generally readable by all users to understand feature descriptions, and writable only by application administrators.

Global collection for defining subscription plans. Documents are keyed by `planId`. Includes a `featureIds` array which is a denormalized list of enabled features, crucial for authorization independence and allowing direct rule evaluation without cross-collection lookups. Public plans are readable by all for display purposes, while all plans are writable only by application administrators.

params.name: planId
params.description: The unique identifier for the specific plan (e.g., 'StarterSquad', 'SquadPro').

firestore.reasoning:
The Firestore structure for managing plans and features prioritizes Authorization Independence and Query-Accurate Permissions (QAPs) by using top-level collections and denormalization. The `features` collection (`/features/{featureId}`) stores individual feature definitions. The `plans` collection (`/plans/{planId}`) stores the different subscription plans. Each `Plan` document explicitly includes a `featureIds` array, which lists all features enabled for that specific plan. This denormalization is CRITICAL for authorization independence, as it allows security rules to check feature access directly against the `Plan` document's data without needing to perform `get()` operations on the `/features` collection. For instance, a rule can verify `request.resource.data.plan.featureIds.hasAny(['myFeatureId'])` if a user's team is linked to a plan, ensuring atomic rule evaluation and simplifying debugging.

QAPs are achieved by segregating features and plans into their own top-level collections. The `/features` collection can be listed directly to retrieve all available features for display or administration. Similarly, the `/plans` collection can be listed directly, with server-side queries easily filtering for `isPublic: true` plans, which are suitable for display to all users (authenticated or not) during onboarding or upgrade flows. Plans marked `isPublic: false` or `isContactOnly: true` can be restricted to admin-only views. This structural segregation ensures that `list` operations are secure and performant, as security rules do not need to act as filters, but rather enforce access based on the inherent structure and explicit fields (like `isPublic`). Access control for modifying these collections will rely on a DBAC model, using a dedicated `/roles_admin/{uid}` collection to identify administrators, ensuring that only authorized users can update plan or feature definitions.
